title: Don't know whom to approach: Former Calcutta High Court Justice Sahidullah Munshi on exclusion from West Bengal SIR
description: Former Calcutta High Court Justice Sahidullah Munshi has been marked as “not found” in the West Bengal Special Intensive Revision (SIR) exercise despite submitting documents twice and undergoing verification.Munshi and his family members were not included in the first draft of the rolls.“What happened with me was after the first SIR notification was out, we submitted all our documents. Me, my wife and my elder son and my son, we submitted our documents to the Booth Level Officer. Our name did no
